text:
is the advisor of the Wall Beautification Club at the Attack Junior High School.

Appearance

Hannes is an older man who is usually seen wearing a dark tracksuit. He has light, short hair and a small beard and mustache that is kept trimmed short as well.

Personality

Hannes is a generally laid back individual but is known to be passionate about the club he advises, the Wall Beautification Club. He is also usually drunk, smelling of cheese and beer on several occasions. It is believed that being the club advisor is Hannes' only real job, due to comments made by him after the Club is temporarily suspended.
